nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers after 5am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 61, with temperatures rising to around 64 overnight. Northeast wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy. Low around 63, with temperatures rising to around 65 overnight. East southeast wind around 12 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 5pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 83. Southeast wind 10 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
